title: Beginner Buddy Program
problem: Beginner classes run at only 48.9% — your lowest category. These are your most valuable new members but you are losing them early.
strategy: Pair every new Beginner attendee with a "STRONG Buddy" — an experienced member who volunteers to guide them through their first 3 classes. This creates accountability, community and gives loyal members a leadership role.
referralAngle: Ask Buddies to invite one friend to join as their Beginner — they get to show off their expertise and their friend gets a warm intro.
expectedImpact: Estimated +15-20% utilization lift, +3-5 referrals per month
howToStart: Identify your top 10 most loyal members (Member Profiles tab). Reach out personally. Offer a free class or branded merch for volunteering.
message: Hey [Name]! You've been such an incredible part of STRONG — we'd love to give you an exclusive role as a STRONG Buddy. Help guide new members through their first few classes and invite a friend to join you. Interested? 💪

title: Get Loaded Challenge
problem: Loaded classes run at 55.6%. Strong members are skipping them in favour of Body classes.
strategy: 4-week "Get Loaded" challenge. Members earn points for attending Loaded classes. Leaderboard posted in studio and on Instagram stories.
referralAngle: Challenge entries are doubled if you bring a friend to their first Loaded class. Friend gets a free trial.
expectedImpact: +12% utilization lift for the month, high social media content generation
howToStart: Post the challenge 2 weeks in advance. Create a simple studio leaderboard. Use Member Tracker to identify at-risk members and personally invite them.
message: Hey [Name]! We're launching the STRONG Loaded Challenge — 4 weeks, maximum strength, epic results. Bring a friend and both entries count double 🏋️ Are you in?

title: Sweat Session Socials
problem: Sweat classes perform near average but have huge social media potential — high intensity classes are the most shareable content.
strategy: Turn one Sweat class per month into a social event. Partner with a local smoothie bar or health brand for post-class refreshments.
referralAngle: Members who tag the studio and bring a friend get priority booking for next month's social Sweat session.
expectedImpact: Organic social media reach, estimated 5-8 new leads per event from Instagram/Facebook visibility
howToStart: Pick your highest-attended Sweat slot (Heatmap tab). Partner with one local brand. Create a hashtag like #STRONGSweatCR.
message: Hey [Name]! You're one of our Sweat regulars 💦 We're doing a full social event on [date] — bring a friend and both classes are on us. See you there!

title: Pilates Passport
problem: Pilates is your second best category but has room to grow. Pilates has a strong word-of-mouth community.
strategy: A branded stamp card — members earn a stamp for each Pilates class. After 10 stamps, they earn a free class AND a friend pass valid for 14 days.
referralAngle: Every passport completed generates one new trial visitor. At current conversion rates that's roughly 1 new member per 2 passports.
expectedImpact: Low cost, high retention. Estimated 8-12 new trials per month once running.
howToStart: Design a simple stamp card. Identify your top Pilates attendees from Member Profiles and give them the first batch personally.
message: Hey [Name]! You're one of our most dedicated Pilates members 🧘 We're launching the STRONG Pilates Passport — attend 10 classes, earn a free class plus a friend pass. Your passport starts today!

title: STRONG After Dark
problem: Friday evenings dramatically underperform (202 check-ins vs 733 on Tuesday). Evening members are your highest churn risk.
strategy: Monthly "STRONG After Dark" on a Friday evening. Special themed class, music, community vibe. Lower intensity so it feels like a social occasion.
referralAngle: Frame it as a "bring your work friends" night. Evening members know other working professionals who want to work out after hours.
expectedImpact: Re-engage lapsed evening members + generate working professional leads. Estimated 6-10 new leads per event.
howToStart: Check Evening Members list in Member Profiles. Personally invite the top 20 evening members who have been absent 14+ days.
message: Hey [Name]! We miss you at STRONG evenings 🌙 We're doing STRONG After Dark on Friday [date] — relaxed, fun, great music. Bring a work friend and both classes are on us. Can we save you a spot?
